div.div:
✅ 解决方案：游标分页
第一页：SELECT * ORDER BY id LIMIT 10
第二页：SELECT * WHERE id > 10 ORDER BY id LIMIT 10 (用上一页最后 id 做起点)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 249, 196), rgb(33, 28, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(249, 168, 37), rgb(149, 79, 0));

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #E65100;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#E65100, #fb7b35); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: ⚠ 局限性：跳页、多列排序、复杂 WHERE 条件时游标分页不适用
